subject: [PATCH v6 1/6] sunrpc: add per-netns per-procedure call counts to svc_stat

2026-06-19.patch_summary: This patch adds per-network namespace (netns) and per-procedure call counts to the svc_stat structure in the sunrpc module. The existing global call count arrays are not network-namespace-aware, which is a problem for the upcoming netlink stats interface that requires namespace-scoped statistics. To solve this issue, the patch introduces per-netns equivalents of the global call count arrays and manages them using new alloc and free helpers. This change allows for more accurate and detailed statistics to be collected and reported.
